name: devfolio
description: Prepare, validate, preview, and safely publish Devfolio hackathon submissions from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Devfolio workflows. Without an MCP connection, Codex can help inspect public hackathons and prepare local submission drafts. With a Devfolio MCP URL, Codex can view active hackathons, fetch submission guides, manage project drafts, upload images, and safely create, update, or publish projects after confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Set up Devfolio MCP in Codex.
